title: 'Prediction' — Apr 1 2019 micro-rant
html:
21-second voice memo just after leaving school (Apr 1 2019, grants pass high school) — Yahir labels it "Prediction," gripes that someone (a coach / teacher / "they") doesn't want to bring him along because of friend-attitude issues, hopes the prediction doesn't pan out. Sits in the grants pass teen era cluster of in-the-moment frustration recordings — same energy as 2019 09 25 voice memo 1455 and 2019 03 27 voice memo 2158.

grants pass teen era · grants pass high school · recording as note · react not what happens

related.label: It Doesn't Matter What Happens, It Matters How You React
